creator: david@wood2.org.uk
text:
SQL authenticated logins break after upgrade to 1.3.1rc1, with {UNKNOWN_TAG} appearing in the proftpd SQL log file. Vendor has confirmed the bug in the project's Bugzilla for 1.3.1rc1 at http://bugs.proftpd.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2869

Fix: 

Add *both* patches in http://bugs.proftpd.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2869 to the port until the next release appears (which presumably will incorporate them as they've been committed to the project's CVS repository).
How-To-Repeat: Compile the port, configure to require SQL authentication against MySQL.
